message:
perf(e2e): fail fast on startup-open storms

Before: mt-mvcc-bench --threads=20 --iters=1 --rows-per-thread=1000 could hang indefinitely after BusyRecovery worker-open panics at the startup barrier; pass-over-pass ratio regressions were not gated.
After:  mt-mvcc-bench --threads=20 --iters=1 --rows-per-thread=1000 --history-json=/tmp/mt-mvcc-history.cod5.json now exits with an explicit startup failure instead of hanging, and a synthetic-history run fails on 12t 1.00x -> 0.21x (79.18% drop).
Bench:  /tmp/rch_target_cod5main/debug/mt-mvcc-bench --threads=20 --iters=1 --rows-per-thread=1000 --history-json=/tmp/mt-mvcc-history.cod5.json
Bead:   bd-ma5m2
Follow-up: bd-ma5m2.1
